revalidation_note: Capabilities listed in revalidation_queued must be re-tested live on first healthy xMilo Sidecar startup after migration. Do not treat them as available until re-tested.

TTS.notes: Worked reliably in the recovered baseline.

Camera.consent_gate: Tier 3 for capture, Tier 2 for info only
Camera.notes: Permissions granted previously. Validate by file existence and non-zero size. Capture requires explicit user consent.

Battery.notes: Worked reliably in the recovered baseline.

Vibration.notes: Worked reliably in the recovered baseline.

Gravity Sensor.notes: Worked reliably in the recovered baseline.

Orientation Sensor.notes: Worked reliably in the recovered baseline.

Light Sensor.notes: Worked reliably in the recovered baseline.

Step Counter.notes: Worked reliably in the recovered baseline.

Torch.notes: Older baseline used the wrong command name. Must be re-tested live.

Clipboard.consent_gate: Tier 3 for read, Tier 2 for write
Clipboard.notes: Must be tested with set-then-get, not get alone. Read requires explicit user consent.

Proximity Sensor.notes: Older baseline had no valid readings. Re-test live before concluding unavailable.

Tilt Detector.notes: Use exact live sensor name only if it appears in termux-sensor -l.

Environmental Sensors.notes: Use exact live sensor names only if they appear in termux-sensor -l.
